trends.headline: 'Cloud skin' is BeautyTok's soft-blur summer makeup finish
trends.body: Creators are ditching high-glow dewy looks for 'cloud skin' — a soft, blurred, slightly matte finish that reads ethereal on camera and survives summer heat. Easy angle: a 'glazed vs cloud skin' side-by-side, or a 'how I get cloud skin with 3 products' GRWM.

trends.headline: Spicule 'micro-needle' serums are SkincareTok's tingly texture fix
trends.body: Spicule serums — packed with tiny silica structures that create micro-channels in skin — are blowing up for the tingle and the visible texture/pore payoff without harsh acids. Creator angle: a 'why my serum tingles' explainer or a 2-week pores-and-texture before/after diary.

trends.headline: The 'Blokette' aesthetic is FashionTok's sporty-girly summer formula
trends.body: Blokette — jersey tank or sports top + flippy skirt + ballet flats — mixes blokecore sportiness with coquette girliness into an easy, comfortable summer outfit. Creator angle: a 'blokette in 5 outfits' reel or a 'how to style one jersey top three ways' lookbook.

trends.headline: Statement colorful flip-flops are FashionTok's summer shoe flex
trends.body: Bold, colorful flip-flops and jelly sandals are this summer's it-shoe, swapping minimalist neutrals for playful brights in haul and styling content. Creator angle: a 'colorful flip-flops styled high vs low' reel or a thrift/budget 'where I found mine' sourcing haul.

trends.headline: Biscoff yogurt tiramisu is FoodTok's no-bake summer dessert
trends.body: A lighter 'yogurt tiramisu' built from thick yogurt, Lotus Biscoff cookies and coffee is racking up saves as a high-protein, no-bake summer dessert. Creator angle: a one-jar 'protein tiramisu' ASMR build or a 'viral yogurt tiramisu — worth the hype?' taste test.

trends.headline: Coconut iced coffee is DrinkTok's tropical at-home pour for 2026
trends.body: Coconut-infused iced coffee — espresso over ice with coconut milk or cream — is the cafe-copycat drink replacing last year's plain cold brew. Creator angle: a 'make the viral coconut iced coffee at home' POV pour or a 'cafe vs my kitchen' cost-and-taste comparison.

trends.headline: 'Hybrid training' is FitTok's do-it-all summer workout format
trends.body: Hybrid training — blending strength, cardio and mobility in one program (think lifting + running, or HIIT + yoga) — is the rising FitTok format for people who don't want to pick a lane. Creator angle: a 'my week of hybrid training' vlog or a '20-minute hybrid session you can do anywhere' follow-along.

trends.headline: Sunset lamps are HomeTok's mood-lighting background of the summer
trends.body: Sunset projection lamps that cast a warm circular glow on walls and ceilings are back as the cheap way to transform a room — and to upgrade any creator's filming background. Creator angle: a 'this $20 lamp changed my room' reveal or a 'nighttime wind-down routine' with the glow set behind you.

trends.headline: Portable mini projectors are TechTok's 'didn't know I needed it' gadget
trends.body: Wireless rechargeable mini projectors are surging as the impulse-buy gadget for movie nights, dorms and bedroom ceilings, with creators calling them 'the gadget I didn't know I needed.' Creator angle: a 'mini projector setup for the perfect movie night' demo or a 'is the viral $80 projector actually good?' honest test.

trends.headline: The Toniebox is ParentTok's screen-free audio player of the summer
trends.body: The Toniebox — a soft, toddler-proof speaker activated by collectible character figures — is ParentTok's go-to screen-free entertainer for road trips and quiet time. Creator angle: a 'screen-free summer with the Toniebox' day-in-the-life or a 'Toniebox vs the alternatives' parent review.

trends.headline: Cooling pet beds and ice mats are PetTok's heat-wave must-have
trends.body: Self-cooling pet beds, gel mats and ice pads are going viral as creators film their dogs and cats flopping onto them in the summer heat. Creator angle: a 'my dog's reaction to the viral cooling mat' reveal or a 'keeping pets cool in a heat wave' product roundup.

trends.headline: 'Destination dupes' are TravelTok's budget summer trip format
trends.body: Creators are racking up saves with 'destination dupes' — pitching a cheaper, less-crowded city that gives the same vibe as an overtouristed hotspot (Albania for Italy, etc.). Creator angle: a 'skip [famous place], go here instead' swap or a side-by-side 'same vibe, half the price' breakdown.

trends.headline: Beaded jewelry is JewelryTok's bigger-and-bolder summer comeback
trends.body: Chunky beaded necklaces and bracelets are back and bigger than ever, fitting 2026's maximalist, colorful, DIY-friendly mood. Creator angle: a 'make your own beaded summer bracelet stack' DIY or a 'where to source cheap statement beads' haul.

trends.headline: The 'First Date Necklace' is JewelryTok's storytelling moment
trends.body: The 'First Date Necklace' trend has creators picking a special-occasion piece and narrating the story behind it, leaning into 2026's self-expression-over-minimalism mood. Creator angle: a 'getting ready with my first date necklace' GRWM or a 'the necklace I wear for big moments' story-time.
